title: [Griffin's Keen, Snow Scramble]
description: Lack of handholds on the ice covered rock and piles of shifting snow on the trail make progress slow and painful.  A loud, shrill sound echoes down the wall of the mountainside.  One can only hope that it is the shriek of the wind.

wayto.4579: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'up'
wayto.4581: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
